# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    parameters {
        string(name: 'artifactUrl1', defaultValue: '', description: '')
        string(name: 'artifactUrl2', defaultValue: '', description: '')
        // Add more parameters for additional URLs as needed
    }

    stages {
        stage('Download Artifacts') {
            steps {
                withCredentials([credentialsId: 'production_server_credentials', usernameVariable: 'username', passwordVariable: 'password']) {
                    stages.each { stage ->
                        def productionServer = stage.name.capitalize()

                        script {
                            def url = "${stage.name}_artifactUrl".call(this) // Using Groovy methods to extract URL from parameters
                            def remoteFile = url.split('/').last()
                            def localFile = "build/${remoteFile}"

                            sh "wget -q -O ${localFile} ${url}"

                            sshbound(credentials: [username: "${env.username}", password: '${env.password}'], host: "${productionServer}") {
                                sh "scp ${localFile} user@${productionServer}:/path/to/deploy"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
